name: Black Bean Chili #15
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Beef stew meat, cut into 1-inch cubes
1 to 2 jalapeno chili peppers, chopped (remove seeds)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
2. Add 2 onions, bell peppers, and garlic; sauté until tender, about 14 minutes.
3. Transfer onion mixture to a bowl using a slotted spoon.
4. Add beef and pork to the pan; cook over medium-high heat until meat is no longer pink, stirring occasionally (about 8 minutes).
5. Return onion mixture to the pan.
6. Add tomatoes with reserved liquid, chili powder, chili peppers, cumin, and cayenne pepper. Season with salt (optional) and pepper.
7. Cover the pan and simmer until beef and pork are tender (stir the pan every once in a while), about 1 hour.
8. Add black beans and wine to the chili; simmer uncovered until meat is tender and chili begins to thicken, about 25 minutes.
9. Serve chili in bowls with cheese, cilantro, red onions, and sour cream in separate small bowls.
